name_en: Top-tier original leather M25466 Small Crafty series once again imbues the Capucines BB bag with artisanal light. Taurillon cow leather shapes a classic silhouette, while the woven handle adds a sophisticated touch. The LV lettering displays a jacquard effect, and a detachable tassel hangs below the lock. Dimensions: 17.3 x 9 x 27 cm (H x W x D)
